  crashed url-seen (AbstractMethodError with flyway-core 9.x)

to avoid musl libc native library crash, and add --no-watch-fs flag.

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v8: 8 bug fixes from full weather module code review (#12)

Tasks completed:
- Task 1: Replace 5-share CLOB minimum with 1-share sanity guard (strategy.rs, main + ladder pass) -- v5 dollar floor was already correct, 5-share guard was re-introduced and conflicting
- Task 2: Apply bias_f/bias_c in fetch_ensemble (open_meteo.rs) -- parse_multi_model had bias, ensemble did not, inconsistent scale
- Task 3: Fix position monitor resolution window to use local city timezone via chrono-tz (position_monitor.rs) -- Seoul UTC+9 window was 9h late with hardcoded 23:59 UTC
- Task 4: Buffer check uses adjusted_forecast.high_temp not forecast.high_temp (strategy.rs) -- same-day observation adjustments were bypassing buffer
- Task 5: Rename markets_skipped_disagreement -> markets_high_disagreement (strategy.rs) -- markets were flagged not skipped since v6 CV-Kelly
- Task 6 (hybrid): Add buenos-aires + ankara to default_cities_intl(); remove wellington from WEATHER_CITIES (mod.rs, markets.rs) -- guaranteed NO FORECAST spam every cycle; wellington stays removed per intentional decision
- Task 7: Delete dead extreme_edge_size_factor() function (strategy.rs) -- replaced by CV-Kelly in v6, never called
- Task 8: Telegram alert on zero markets discovered (strategy.rs) -- silent discovery failures now notify operator
- Task 9: Deferred (calibration edge_cv on eval rows)

fix(setup): prevent SELECT.NULL leaking into MY_STATE for single-state parks

When a park is not multi-state, set_options([]) doesn't reset the Select
value to BLANK, so str(value) was "SELECT.NULL". Now my_state is only read
from the Select when the state row is actually visible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add 2026-03-07 deep codebase analysis report

Multi-agent review across all 8 SWE verticals (Architecture, Code Quality,
Testing, Security, Performance, DevOps, Data Management, API Design).
1255 lines, 50 findings (5 P0 · 13 P1 · 21 P2 · 11 P3) with file:line citations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Complete 19-agent audit: fix all P0-P2 issues and polish remaining items

Security (P0): IDOR protection via assertBuildingAccess/filterAuthorizedBuildingIds,
AES-256-GCM encryption for PM credentials, parameterized SQL queries, DB transactions
for all multi-step writes, connection pooling.

Performance (P1): N+1 queries replaced with LEFT JOINs and batch inArray queries,
11 DB indexes on FK columns, unstable_cache with tag-based revalidation.

Infrastructure (P1): security headers (HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.), rate limiting
on key API routes, Sentry error monitoring, console.error for all catch blocks.

Quality (P2): Vitest with 53 tests for calculator/mixed-use, GitHub Actions CI
(tsc, lint, test), CSV import moved to Inngest background job, accessibility
improvements (aria-sort, aria-labels, keyboard nav).

Polish: toast notifications via Sonner, pagination (server-side for buildings,
client-side for readings/portfolio), compliance-detail-client refactored into
3 extracted components, dark mode fixes across 9 files, legal pages (privacy/terms),
RLS migration, API documentation, unused imports/deps cleanup.

Passes tsc --noEmit, vitest (53/53), eslint (0 errors, 0 warnings).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

New standalone mode that reads raw editor/referee report files, segments

commit.message:
opus-2026-03-06-S26: CORRECTED consecutive-position formula for M[a,b]

THEOREM: For a ≠ b,
  M[a,b] = sum_j (-1)^j * N(a,b,j)
where N(a,b,j) = #{paths with {a,b} at consecutive positions {j,j+1}}.

This corrects kind-pasteur's claim which used only C(a,b,j) (directed).
The symmetrized N = C(a,b,j) + C(b,a,j) is needed because M is symmetric
but C is zero when A[a,b]=0. Verified exhaustively at n=3,4,5 and sampled n=6.

Also: original formula fails at n=3,4 (and most of n=5) — only works
when restricted to edge-supported entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Equity: 6 improvements — dividend, links, watchlist search, drag clamp, revenue/EV fix

Dividend yield:
- Added to Price & Market section on both EDGAR and legacy paths
- Sources: v7.trailingAnnualDividendYield → Finnhub dividendYieldIndicatedAnnual
- Shows 'N/A' for non-dividend stocks

Company links (Website / 10-K / 10-Q):
- Website: fetched from EDGAR submissions CIK.json, falls back to Finnhub weburl
- 10-K / 10-Q: direct links to SEC EDGAR filing search by CIK
- Displayed as pill buttons in stock header (right-aligned)

Watchlist name search:
- Refactored autocomplete into reusable attachTickerAutocomplete(input, onSelect)
- Each watchlist group's add-ticker input now supports company name search
- Main search and watchlist inputs share identical autocomplete behavior

Chart drag clamping:
- afterDraw stores chart._dataPts (rendered pixel positions)
- mousemove clamps dragEnd to [pts[0].x, pts[last].x] so the
  selection box can never extend beyond the actual chart line

Revenue + EV/EBITDA:
- EDGAR + Finnhub now fetched in parallel; Finnhub revenue supplements
  EDGAR when EDGAR tags don't match (banks, insurance, healthcare, etc.)
- Added 10+ additional EDGAR revenue tags covering banking, insurance,
  retail, pharma, and older filer naming conventions
- EV/EBITDA falls back to Finnhub's pre-computed ev/ebitda ratio when
  EDGAR EBITDA is unavailable; removed > 0 guard (shows for any value)
- Website also fetched from EDGAR submissions API (same domain, fast)
- Finnhub source badge added to source popup

Add group button:
- Increased bottom padding/margin so button is fully visible

commit.message:
Robust setup, fix hotspot/tailscale/sleep, improve wizard UX

Setup reliability:
- Pin all Python package versions in requirements.txt
- apt-get with --fix-missing, 3 retries, individual fallback installs
- Make setup_pi.sh fully idempotent (safe to re-run)
- Load i2c-dev kernel module for ddcutil backlight control
- Add ddcutil, wlr-randr, fonts-noto-color-emoji to critical package list

WiFi hotspot fix:
- Restore iptables HTTP redirect in start_hotspot() (was accidentally removed)

Tailscale wizard fix:
- Run tailscale up in background with 5min timeout
- Read auth URL from tailscale status (reliable) instead of process output
- Kill stale tailscale up processes before starting fresh
- Fix polling that was clearing QR code immediately after display

Sleep mode fix:
- Revert ddcci to power off/on (d6 4/1) instead of brightness 0
- Touchscreen warning banner when USB not detected

Wizard improvements:
- Bigger QR codes (400px, quiet zone, white padding)
- Sleep step: show 4 methods as selectable buttons, optional test
- Album step: load configured albums from server, poll every 5s
- Add GET /api/frame/settings endpoint (no passwords exposed)
- Fix sleep method label for ANMITE touchscreen
- Tailscale QR code polling no longer clears the code

the backend upstream so nginx resolves at request time, not startup.

Alice bck1336: 8/9 admits proved in column_map_pointwise_locally_continuous

Proved H0_reach (0 in reach_s via lemma54_1 + congr_on), Hreach_ne,
all conjunction extractions, and set difference membership.
Only Hstep (one-step transfer) remains.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix proxy fetch broken by base tag in rendered HTML

The <base href="bibliotheque-islamique.fr"> injected via
dangerouslySetInnerHTML was corrupting document.baseURI, causing
fetch('/api/proxy') to resolve to the wrong origin. Fixed by:
- Using absolute URL (window.location.origin) for proxy fetch
- Removing <base> tag on web, rewriting relative URLs to absolute instead
- Keeping <base> tag only for native WebView (isolated context)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

security: harden app against injection, SSRF, and info-disclosure risks

- Add runtime allowlist to validAnnualSalaryFilter() to prevent sql.raw injection
- Escape LIKE/ILIKE wildcards (%, _) in all user-supplied search/filter params
- Validate ML_SERVICE_URL against ML_SERVICE_ALLOWED_HOSTS allowlist (SSRF)
- Fix IP trust hierarchy (fly-client-ip > x-real-ip > rightmost XFF)
- Upgrade IP hash from DJB2 to HMAC-SHA256 with IP_HASH_SECRET
- Add AbortSignal.timeout() to all external fetch calls (Adzuna 15s, ML/geocoding 5-10s)
- Add security headers to next.config.ts (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.)
- Validate company IDs against /^[0-9a-f]{16}$/ before DB query
- Replace raw error object logging with structured JSON in API catch blocks
- Gate stack traces behind NODE_ENV !== 'production' in all scripts
- Sanitize dangerouslySetInnerHTML in chart.tsx with CSS ident/color validators
- Remove redundant dotenv.config() from Adzuna client

Key changes:
- routes.ts: Added Creative Canon Hierarchy doc, marked Creative Lab as CANON

- Add HARD RULES block at top of carousel prompt: no 'we/our', no em
  dashes, no sparkle emoji, sentence case, UK English

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Find installed_plugins.json by walking up from plugin_root

In cache layout, plugin_root is deeply nested
(~/.claude/plugins/cache/mkt/bootstrap/ver/) and the registry lives at
~/.claude/plugins/installed_plugins.json — several levels up. The previous
approach (os.path.dirname) only worked in dev layout by coincidence.

Now walks upward from plugin_root looking for installed_plugins.json.
Falls back to parent dir if not found (preserving original behavior).

Fixes: unreal-kit bootstrap never runs on Windows (and any cache layout).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: pick most recent market-lines artifact, not largest

The Resolve Market Lines run ID step was sorting by artifact size
descending, causing it to select an old 12KB artifact (March 5) over
fresh 8-9KB artifacts from today. Fixed to filter runs with non-zero
artifact size then sort by run ID descending (most recent first).

commit.message:
fix(renderer): restore depth mask before glClear to fix 3D clipping artifact

glDepthMask(GL_FALSE) set by the 2D pipeline restore at end of each frame
was silently preventing glClear(GL_DEPTH_BUFFER_BIT) from executing on the
next frame. Stale depth values caused geometry to clip against last frame's
depth footprint — visible as a flat wall cutting through 3D meshes.

Fix: beginFrame() restores GL_TRUE depth mask before clearing if the
pipeline tracker shows it was left false.

Also: build-engineer.md — agent now owns vcpkg package installation for
all required triplets, runs installs in background before compile step.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Complete enterprise security implementation and documentation

SECURITY FIXES (All P0/P1 vulnerabilities resolved):
- Fix critical client-side credential exposure - moved all API keys server-side
- Implement secure server-side API proxy with Redis sessions
- Replace localStorage with httpOnly cookies for session management
- Remove client-side encryption and move to server-side
- Add comprehensive input validation with XSS/SQL injection prevention
- Implement enhanced security headers (CSP, HSTS, XSS protection)

ARCHITECTURE & COMPONENTS:
- Create secure Express.js API proxy server with comprehensive middleware
- Build GTI ransomware dashboard with threat intelligence integration
- Implement HITRUST r2 v11.5 compliance tracking system
- Add vulnerability management workflow with 30-day sprint planning
- Create enhanced authentication with MFA and RBAC support
- Build comprehensive audit logging with tamper-proof hash chains

DOCUMENTATION:
- Add complete development guide (CLAUDE.md)
- Create API integration guide with troubleshooting
- Document security architecture and best practices
- Add deployment guide with production hardening
- Include refactoring plan for technical debt management

SECURITY COMPLIANCE:
- OWASP Top 10 protection implemented
- Enterprise-grade security headers and CSP
- Zero client-side credential exposure
- Comprehensive audit logging and monitoring
- Rate limiting and DDoS protection
- Input validation and sanitization throughout

Ready for production deployment with enterprise security standards.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

commit.message:
Add agent budget management — per-tick token budgets with supervisor control

- Each agent has a token_budget (default 50k/tick), enforced in the API loop
- Agents that exceed budget stop early with [BUDGET] log entry
- Supervisor gets get_agent_budgets (P&L for all 17 agents) and
  set_agent_budget (reallocate 10k-200k tokens per agent)
- Supervisor prompt rewritten as COO: review P&L, reward high-ROI agents,
  cut low performers, manage colony economics
- Per-agent state shows: budget utilization, times exhausted, cost USD,
  revenue credits, ROI ratio
- Colony state shows: total economics, budget decisions, colony-wide ROI
